item.title: Images of Note: Pictures that Seb hates
item.description:
Sound on if you wanna see the weirdest bullshit
Poor Penny
Young people existing is apparently the worst thing that can happen these days
I know where that bridge is and I wanna go there.
Radio doesn't die because audio is a versatile yet cheap and easy format
(it's true)
Children are like this.
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii Come see me go mad over pixels.
Not them, they look very polite
babies! creatures even!
(I fail to see the issue)
:3
:o
o7
never
Sound on, rip headphones users
:c
:3
Yes
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii We can now sacrifice people to the Volcano!
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay For STREEEEEEEEEEAM: http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Some programming humor for a niche audience
item.description:
1
2. Them: You can't code with only 3 keys Me:
3.
4
5. Jeeeez, them laptops....
6. That's amazing
7
8. Shouldn't have done that
9. I HALP
10. Are you a DEV or a QA?
11
12. Oh, shit
13
14. Yo, this guy approached me!
And finally I would like to share something from myself. I've been working very hard on Stanley Parable-like game with a touch of GladOS from Portal called Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)/ The demo made to TOP 10 on Steam's demo trending tab! And it features witty signs like this one here. "What?", I hear you ask. "I can read funny signs for free?" YES, yes you can! Try it now on Steam and please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse Thank you, and if this dump made you smile at least once, I am happy with it! : )
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Welp, guess I'm committed now
item.description:
Woke up this morning to find my post has exploded! Did not see that coming...
Figure I'll share my second project I've made!
It's a....ghost?
A blob? That wants my soul?
Oh fuck it can fly!!!
It's a mothman!
I'm so happy with how the wings came out! There was much cursing as I was trying to figure it out.
L̴̵̨̺̣͕̬͍̺̣̬̥͈̂͗̀ͤ͂͂ͯ̆͗̆͘͡_̀ A͖̞̙̬͈̖͑̏ͯ͛̊̉͒ͧ̒̕̚ Ḿ̴̴̴̴̡̪͚̩̫̖̣̦̝͐̓̓̆̀̈́͊̌ͯ͠ P̵͔͉̥̩͉̬̞̗̈́ͣ̏̀̄̍̽̏̆ͣ̾͟͞͝
I was crying as I read all your amazing words! I can't wait to post more for you all to see!
item.dc:creator: hookedonyarnics

item.title: Triss Merigold Body Paint - MCroft07
item.description: I painted this on myself using a mirror (and brushes). First time painting anyone from The Witcher, but wanted to finally do it since I've had so many suggestions for it :) I exist on the internet here: Instagram: www.instagram.com/mcroft07 Twitter: www.twitter.com/MCroft07 Tiktok: www.tiktok.com/@mcroft07 Twitch: www.twitch.tv/mcroft07
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: Comic Dump of my Dog- he needs help
item.description:
Atreyu has been in a lot of my comics. He’s my best friend and is such a joy in my life
He goes with us on all our adventures, never missing a moment to live his best life and have fun.
He was a shelter rescue that was abused and starved by his previous owners before we adopted and rehabilitated him
He is my EVERYTHING. And he almost died last night. If my comics have ever made you laugh, smile, anything, I pray you will help me get exposure on this post. We are desperate. Thank you
We need help. On May 11th, at 11:30 pm, our beloved German Shepherd, Atreyu, had his stomach flip; Gastric Dilatation Volvulus (GDV). This is an emergency and life-threatening situation in which a dog with this condition has on average two hours to live. Last night, while feeding my foster kitten, I checked on Atreyu, who had seemed slightly off the hour before. His abdomen had swelled up to three or four times the size it should be. I knew instantly his stomach had flipped and he was nearing death. Freddie was able to speed to the Veterinary ER Hospital and get there in just enough time for them to perform the life-saving surgery. Atreyu isn’t out of the woods yet, he will be hospitalized for a few more days. He might still pass away but we are hoping he survives. The vets are optimistic. The full vet bill is around 4,500 right now, they warned us it will probably go up each day he’s there. They estimated it could range towards 6,000 but they have no way of knowing. We have a small amount in our savings but we are not able to afford the full amount. Any help from our friends and family or even fans of the comics, to help pay towards his emergency surgery would be desperately and greatly appreciated. I know we are not the only ones tight on money in this economy so please know, no matter what amount you can pay/or upvote this post, if you are able to help us we are forever thankful for anything you can do. http://spot.fund/vnr8hsc
item.dc:creator: ristay

item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: Happy Mother’s Day to the real moms.
item.description: This one is not a real mother. In 1984-85 three of her children were sexually abused by the neighbors. This woman found out and protected the abusers instead of calling the police. I was six, I don’t know why. I am guessing it’s because she was in the house every. time. it. happened. This woman beat me into silence from age 6 to 14ish. That is when my older sister and covictim told me to grab mother’s hand and tell her that she couldn’t hit me any more. She had me sent to juvenile hall. When I tried to kms by slicing my wrists, she woke me up and told me “I was too stupid to kill myself”. When I met my future spouse this mother called them over to the house and told them not to date me. We are still married 20+ years later. This woman has seven grandchildren, only two of them are in contact with her. One grandchild is dead, the other four refuse to see her. Mother is Mormon and a documented racist, homophobic transphobe. I hope this woman burns in hell for all the shit she put us through. To all the substitute mothers I had - Happy Mother’s Day.
item.dc:creator: lurkyloos

item.title: I got an apartment! Living on my own terms for the first time in 7 years!
item.description:
It's not much, but it's mine! I can wake up when I want, I can go to bed when I want. I can eat whatever I want whenever I want. I can say what I want; I can sing what I want.
Biggest downside is this tight tiny kitchen. I LOVE to cook. But now that I'm living alone I'll take a bit of a break from that to explore other creative outlets. Cooking for 1 (who am I kidding? I am 2) is not easy and not usually worth the work/clean up
OMG a bedroom all of my own??? I can fit a big ole comfy bed in here!
bathroom's nothing fancy, but it serves its purpose and is not horrifying (horrifying bathrooms were a common thread in my apartment search....don't know why more landlords don't realize it's an immediate "no thanks"). will definitely be upgrading the shower head asap.
literally everything I owned on my move in date fits in this closet. and the only thing I've bought since then is food and a queen bed.
other side of the closet; love the shelves for a makeshift linen closet
this is what sold me on the property... < 20 min walk to the beach. I went today for the first time; it took me about 25 mins, but I was taking it super easy (recuperating from surgery) and in flip flops.
looking forward to many morning walks on the beach
something's always got to go wrong....the kitchen sink doesn't drain worth a damn. I'll be submitting a maintenance request first thing tomorrow. (it's not ruining my day, and I don't want to ruin anyone elses's Sunday)
Kitchen set up so far. It hasn't been as difficult to work with as I expected.
here is my faaaaannnnncccccy bed (by fancy I mean "not a twin bed", can you even imagine??!!!). I saved a LOT by purchasing the floor model, also. And their credit check must be weak af because they gave me 0% financing for a year. I'm no longer sleeping in a child's bed; I've slept in worse; beggars can't be choosers. p.s. - stay tuned for the story of Fluffy (the yellow *stuffed animal* in this pic). I have been meaning to make a post about Fluffy for quite some time. She's my ride or die for like 38 fucking years (that cannot possibly be right....FUCK ME THAT'S RIGHT)
Don't judge me - I moved in a rush and am also very lazy and procrastinate a lot. Just illustrating further that almost everything I own fits in this closet. It's insane.
the bare necessities (sing it!). crosswords help me poop
this is my current wfh set up (which is at least as good, if not better, than it has been for the last 4 years). hopefully improving in the next 6 months.
item.dc:creator: butnoelephants
